title: Oak Decline Caused by Biotic and Abiotic Factors in Central Europe: A Case Study from the Czech Republic

L2: MDPI Forests Top Cited Paper with Excellent Graphical Abstract 2022
Multifactorial oak decline in Czech Republic: biotic agents and abiotic stress
L3: Excellent graphical abstract showing investigation of biotic agents (subcortical insects, Ophiostoma spp., Phytophthora spp.) in six declining oak stands in mesophytic and thermophytic zones in Czech Republic, following five dry years (2015-2019). Demonstrates multifactorial decline process. CC BY 4.0.
